description: The WorldCaptureThumbnailSource component is used as a point in space to capture the preview of a world in the world browser minus users in the session when a world is saved.

fields.Overlay: The texture to use as an overlay for capturing the thumbnail.
fields.ExcludeUsersInCapture: Whether to exclude users from the thumbnail.

usage: see: World and Session Thumbnails#Customising Thumbnails
